name: Performapal Odd-Eyes Butler
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＥＭ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エンタメイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>オッドアイズ・バトラー
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Once per turn, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can add 1 "Odd-Eyes" Pendulum Monster from your GY to the Extra Deck face-up, and if you do, negate the attack, then you can gain LP equal to that Pendulum Monster's ATK.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is in your hand or GY: You can target 1 "Performapal" or "Odd-Eyes" Monster Card you control, except "Performapal Odd-Eyes Butler"; Special Summon this card, then destroy that card. You can only use this effect of "Performapal Odd-Eyes Butler" once per turn. If this card in the Monster Zone is destroyed: You can place this card in your Pendulum Zone.
pend_eff: Once per turn, when an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can add 1 "Odd-Eyes" Pendulum Monster from your GY to the Extra Deck face-up, and if you do, negate the attack, then you can gain LP equal to that Pendulum Monster's ATK.

action: Adds from Graveyard to Extra Deck
Activates if destroyed by card effect
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
